/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/exec.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/exec.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/exec.dir/src/glad.c.o -o /home/dandiaconescu/Desktop/heiii/physics_engine/bin/exec   -L/home/dandiaconescu/Desktop/heiii/physics_engine/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/dandiaconescu/Desktop/heiii/physics_engine/lib /usr/lib64/libglfw.so.3.4 -lm /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so
